General.Name: Panasialum Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: PanAsialum Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and trades in aluminum products in the People's Republic of China, Australia, South East Asia, and internationally. The company offers electronic, mechanical equipment, and LED heatsinks; solar module frame series; skirt boards and auto parts; electronic products and accessories series; door and window system supply services, including doors and windows with related accessories development, profiles die development, specialized products, and related installation guidance; and fences series. Its products are used in electronic product accessories, photovoltaic systems, new energy transportation, shipbuilding, doors and windows curtain walling, medical devices, construction, green energy, and advanced manufacturing applications. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Kwun Tong, Hong Kong. PanAsialum Holdings Company Limited is a subsidiary of Easy Star Holdings Limited.
